title: SAKURA ACADEMY INTERACTION & SUPERVISED SELF-IMPROVEMENT HOTFIX
confirmed_failure: The Academy shell and its tab buttons shared data-ska-pane. A click changed pane and then bubbled to the shell, which restored the previous pane and re-rendered the UI.
fixes: Replaces the shell attribute with data-ska-active-pane.
Stops propagation after a valid Academy tab selection.
Adds resilient Academy remount after the native Estudio renderer.
Loads the new Academy runtime through a cache-safe v17.15.1 loader.
Keeps approved formulas connected to the native SAKURA chat and Ollama knowledge payload.
Adds Mejora de SAKURA with a live formula test and connection diagnostics.
Mirrors approved cards after every Academy refresh when supervised sync is enabled.
